contextBlurb: Nunavut's housing legislation is primarily administered through the Nunavut Housing Corporation, which received $87,185,000 in capital appropriations under Bill 2, the Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027. The Legislative Assembly has also passed supplementary appropriation bills affecting housing capital, and the Office of the Auditor General has tabled a report specifically on public housing in Nunavut. Overcrowding and tuberculosis links remain documented policy concerns for the Nunavut Housing Corporation.

legislation.title: Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes the Government of Nunavut to make capital expenditures for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027, including $87,185,000 for the Nunavut Housing Corporation out of a total capital appropriation of $373,217,000.

legislation.title: Interim Appropriation (Operations and Maintenance) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes the Government of Nunavut to make interim operations and maintenance expenditures for the 2026-2027 fiscal year, covering departmental operating costs including housing-related services.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriation (Capital) Act, No. 3, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: A supplementary capital appropriation bill for the 2025-2026 fiscal year, considered by the Legislative Assembly of Nunavut in September 2025.

legislation.title: Interim Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes interim capital expenditures for the 2026-2027 fiscal year pending passage of the main capital appropriation, considered by the Legislative Assembly in September 2025.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriations (Operations and Maintenance) Act, No. 3, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: A supplementary operations and maintenance appropriation bill for 2025-2026, assented to by Commissioner Eva Qamaniq Aariak.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriation (Capital) Act, No. 2, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: A supplementary capital appropriation act for the 2025-2026 fiscal year, considered alongside other short bills in the June 2025 sitting of the Legislative Assembly.

legislation.title: Miscellaneous Statutes Amendment Act
legislation.summary: An omnibus amendment act covering miscellaneous statutes in Nunavut, referenced alongside other short bills in the spring 2025 sitting of the Legislative Assembly.

legislation.title: 2025-2026 Main Estimates of the Nunavut Housing Corporation
legislation.summary: The annual main estimates tabled before the Nunavut Legislative Assembly outlining the Nunavut Housing Corporation's planned capital and operational expenditures for 2025-2026.
